attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ) + SMATKEY.MAX_VAL AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
CAST(WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMARTRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 from $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMARTRX ) SMATKEY,
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES WORCTL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES WIATLORDLND
ON (WIATLORDLND.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)
/* REPLACED   WITH INNER QUERY 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
ON WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID */
INNER JOIN ( SELECT  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , ORDER_LINE_ID,  SS_CODE 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA 
ON  ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF = CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT)AS VARCHAR(50)) GROUP BY 1,2,3 ) EORCTLOL 
ON WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
	ON(WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
	AND SAT.SS_CODE='OOD')
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND NSOL.SS_CODE = EORCTLOL.SS_CODE		/*	REMOVING   NSOL.SS_CODE='BV'  */
WHERE
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMATRX
                        WHERE NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SMATRX.SS_CODE
                        AND WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SMATRX.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT)
                        AND COALESCE(NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG,'N')='N'

SELECT
ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      ,
ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            ,
ATTRIBUTE15                   ,
ATTRIBUTE3                    ,
ATTRIBUTE4                    ,
CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               ,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          ,
DESCRIPTION                   ,
EXTENDED_AMOUNT               ,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7             ,
GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER           ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11    ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12    ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14    ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15    ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2     ,
GLOBAL_LINE_ID                ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8     ,
INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT        ,
GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID             ,
LINE_NUMBER                   ,
SORCTL.LINE_TYPE                     ,
LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
ORG_ID                        ,
SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
QUANTITY_CREDITED             ,
QUANTITY_INVOICED             ,
REASON_CODE                   ,
RULE_START_DATE               ,
TAX_RATE                      ,
UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE           ,
UNIT_SELLING_PRICE            ,
UOM_CODE                      ,
ATTRIBUTE1                    ,
ATTRIBUTE2                    ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6     ,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             ,
CREATION_DATE                 ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,
RULE_END_DATE                 ,
SPLIT_KEY                     ,
CREATE_DATETIME               ,
ACTION_CODE                   ,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
 FROM $$STGDB.STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL,
(SEL * FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='OOD') NSSC,
( SELECT  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , ORDER_LINE_ID,  SS_CODE 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA 
ON  ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF = CAST(CAST(ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT)AS VARCHAR(50)) GROUP BY 1,2,3   ) EORCTLON 
WHERE 
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLON.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
AND 
(
NOT EXISTS 
	( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME) 
OR NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL 
		WHERE SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE) 
OR NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
		WHERE SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT 
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE 
		AND SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
OR NOT EXISTS 
	( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES ELORCTL,$$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_ADJD 
		WHERE  SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = ELORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
		AND ELORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL_ADJD.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL_ADJD.SS_CODE) 
OR EXISTS 
	( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
		WHERE EORCTLON.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
		AND   NSOL.SS_CODE = EORCTLON.SS_CODE /* REMOVING NSOL.SS_CODE='BV'  */
		AND COALESCE(NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG,'N')='Y')		
)

SELECT
EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11,
EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12,
EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14,
EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15,
EORCTL.ORG_ID,
EORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
EORCTL.REASON_CODE,
EORCTL.GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER,
EORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED,
EORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
EORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
EORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
EORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
EORCTL.LINE_TYPE,
EORCTL.RULE_START_DATE,
EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,
EORCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID,
EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,
EORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID,
EORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
EORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
EORCTL.ATTRIBUTE15,
EORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
EORCTL.DESCRIPTION,
EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8,
EORCTL.LINE_NUMBER,
EORCTL.TAX_RATE,
EORCTL.UOM_CODE,
EORCTL.CREATION_DATE,
EORCTL.ATTRIBUTE3,
EORCTL.ATTRIBUTE4,
EORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
EORCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
EORCTL.CREATE_DATETIME,
EORCTL.ACTION_CODE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
WHERE EORCTL.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'

SELECT CAST(SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
CAST(SORCTL.LINE_TYPE AS VARCHAR(20)),
CAST(SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS  PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
/*
CASE WHEN	NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN
		CASE WHEN	COALESCE(SORCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) 
		In ('METRIX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ORDER ENTRY') THEN SORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID
		ELSE NULL
		END	
	WHEN	NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  In ('CM','DM') THEN 
		CASE WHEN COALESCE(SORCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) 
		In ('METRIX','ORDER ENTRY','SALES ADJUSTMENTS') THEN
			CASE WHEN (COALESCE(SORCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) = 'METRIX' 
						Or COALESCE(SORCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) = 'ORDER ENTRY'  					
						AND (  CASE  WHEN SORCTL.interface_line_attribute2 Like '%RMA%' THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END) = 'Y' )
					THEN SORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID
			ELSE EORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID 
			END
		ELSE 0
		END	
ELSE	NULL
END	ORDER_LINE_ID */

/* modified the derivation of Order Line ID to populate order level details for OOD CMDM in case they were not getting populated 
due to null values coming from source.In this case for CMDM coming form source we will refer the previous customer trx id to get the order 
level details present in INV, to populate for CMDM too */


CASE WHEN           CAST(NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE AS VARCHAR(50)) = 'INV' THEN
                                        CASE WHEN           COALESCE(CAST(SORCTL.interface_line_context AS VARCHAR(30)),CAST(EORCT.interface_header_context AS VARCHAR(30))) 
                                        In ('METRIX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ORDER ENTRY') THEN SORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID
                                        ELSE NULL
                                        END          
                    WHEN     CAST(NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE AS VARCHAR(50)) In ('CM','DM') THEN 
                    CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(SORCTL.interface_line_context AS VARCHAR(30)), CAST(EORCT.interface_header_context AS VARCHAR(30)))  IS NOT NULL THEN
CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(SORCTL.interface_line_context AS VARCHAR(30)),CAST(EORCT.interface_header_context AS VARCHAR(30))) 
                                        In ('METRIX','ORDER ENTRY','SALES ADJUSTMENTS') THEN
                                                            CASE WHEN (COALESCE(CAST(SORCTL.interface_line_context AS VARCHAR(30)),CAST(EORCT.interface_header_context AS VARCHAR(30))) = 'METRIX' 
                                                                                                                        Or COALESCE(CAST(SORCTL.interface_line_context AS VARCHAR(30)),CAST(EORCT.interface_header_context AS VARCHAR(30))) = 'ORDER ENTRY'                                                                                         
                                                                                                                        AND (  CASE  WHEN CAST(SORCTL.interface_line_attribute2 AS VARCHAR(30)) Like '%RMA%' THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END) = 'Y' )
                                                                                                    THEN SORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID
                                                            ELSE EORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID 
                                                            END
                                        ELSE 0
                                        END          
                    
                                        ELSE EORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID  END
ELSE       NULL
END          ORDER_LINE_ID
,CAST('OOD' AS VARCHAR(10)) IDENTIFIER

FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL EORCT 
	ON	( SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  ) 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES  EORCTL 
	ON	( SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID =EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
	ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT= SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
		AND SAT.SS_CODE='OOD') 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
	ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT   
	ON (      NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
         AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
	    AND   NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE 
	    AND   NATT.SS_CODE = NAT.SS_CODE) 
WHERE SORCTL.LINE_TYPE IN ('LINE','FREIGHT')

UNION ALL

SELECT SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE ,
SOFRCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
/*
CASE WHEN	NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN
		CASE WHEN	COALESCE(SOFRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) 
		In ('METRIX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ORDER ENTRY') THEN SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID
		ELSE NULL
		END	
	WHEN	NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  In ('CM','DM') THEN 
		CASE WHEN COALESCE(SOFRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) 
		In ('METRIX','ORDER ENTRY','SALES ADJUSTMENTS') THEN
			CASE WHEN (COALESCE(SOFRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) = 'METRIX' 
						Or COALESCE(SOFRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) = 'ORDER ENTRY'  					
						AND (  CASE  WHEN SOFRCTL.interface_line_attribute2 Like '%RMA%' THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END) = 'Y' )
					THEN SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID
			ELSE EORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID 
			END
		ELSE 0
		END	
ELSE	NULL
END	ORDER_LINE_ID */

/* modified the derivation of Order Line ID to populate order level details for OOD CMDM in case they were not getting populated 
due to null values coming from source.In this case for CMDM coming form source we will refer the previous customer trx id to get the order 
level details present in INV, to populate for CMDM too */

CASE WHEN           NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN
                                        CASE WHEN           COALESCE(SOFRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) 
                                        In ('METRIX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ORDER ENTRY') THEN SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID
                                        ELSE NULL
                                        END          
                    WHEN      NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  In ('CM','DM') THEN 
                    CASE WHEN COALESCE(SOFRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context)  IS NOT NULL THEN
CASE WHEN COALESCE(SOFRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) 
                                        In ('METRIX','ORDER ENTRY','SALES ADJUSTMENTS') THEN
                                                            CASE WHEN (COALESCE(SOFRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) = 'METRIX' 
                                                                                                                        Or COALESCE(SOFRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) = 'ORDER ENTRY'                                                                                         
                                                                                                                        AND (  CASE  WHEN SOFRCTL.interface_line_attribute2 Like '%RMA%' THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END) = 'Y' )
                                                                                                    THEN SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID
                                                            ELSE EORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID 
                                                            END
                                        ELSE 0
                                        END          
                    
                                        ELSE EORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID  END
ELSE       NULL
END          ORDER_LINE_ID
,CAST('FUSN' AS VARCHAR(10)) IDENTIFIER

FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SOFRCTL 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL EORCT 
	ON	( SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  ) 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES  EORCTL 
	ON	( SOFRCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID =EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
	ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT= SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
		AND SAT.SS_CODE='OOD') 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
	ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT   
	ON (      NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
         AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
	    AND   NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE 
	    AND   NATT.SS_CODE = NAT.SS_CODE) 
WHERE SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE IN ('LINE','FREIGHT')

SELECT 
CAST(WSORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
CAST(WSORCTL.LINE_TYPE AS VARCHAR(20)) AS LINE_TYPE ,
CAST(WSORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS  PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
COALESCE(WSORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID,EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID),
CAST('OOD' AS VARCHAR(10)) IDENTIFIER
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES WSORCTL 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES  EORCTL  
	ON	( WSORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID =EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL 
	ON ( EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WSORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID) 
WHERE WSORCTL.LINE_TYPE = 'TAX'

UNION ALL 

SELECT 
WSOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WSOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE ,
WSOFRCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
COALESCE(WSOFRCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID,EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID),
'FUSN' AS IDENTIFIER
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES WSOFRCTL  
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES  EORCTL  
	ON	( WSOFRCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID =EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL 
	ON ( EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WSOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID) 
WHERE WSOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE = 'TAX'

SELECT
 SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
 ,SAT.AR_TRX_KEY                    
 ,SATL_ADJD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
, CAST(NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS VARCHAR(3)) AS BK_COMPANY_CODE  
 ,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
 , CAST(NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER AS VARCHAR(50)) AS BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER  
 , CAST(NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE AS VARCHAR(50)) AS BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE     
, CAST(WORCTL.LINE_TYPE AS VARCHAR(20)) AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE 
,WORCTL.LINE_NUMBER BK_AR_TRX_LINE_NUMBER_INT 
, CAST(WORCTL.REASON_CODE AS VARCHAR(30)) AS AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
  ,NULL  BK_SAF_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY       
 ,NULL BK_SAF_COMPANY_CODE           
 ,NULL  BK_SAF_ID_INT                 
 ,CASE WHEN CAST(WORCTL.LINE_TYPE AS VARCHAR(20)) ='FREIGHT' THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
  (CASE WHEN EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL OR  EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID = 0  
 OR EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID = -9999 OR /* ADDED THIS ALSO */ EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID = -999
  THEN 'NON-APPLIED' ELSE 'APPLIED' END ) 
  END APPLIED_TRANSACTION_TYPE      
 ,CASE WHEN CAST(WATLPTI.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) =-9999 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AR_TRX_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ROLE   
 ,WORCTL.CREATION_DATE AR_TRX_LINE_CREATION_DATETIME 
 ,CAST(WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
 , CAST(NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS VARCHAR(8)) AS SS_CODE 
 
 , CAST(WORCTL.DESCRIPTION AS VARCHAR(240)) AS DESCRIPTION 
 ,'=' AS RU_XAAS_PREPAYMENT_FLG
 /* , -9999 AS RU_BK_XAAS_SALES_ORDER_ID_INT */ /* Q3fy16 XAAS Changes  */
 ,WORCTL.ACTION_CODE 
 ,'I' AS DML_TYPE
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES WORCTL
 /*  REPLACED   WITH INNER QUERY 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
 ON WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID */
 INNER JOIN  ( SELECT  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , ORDER_LINE_ID,  SS_CODE 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA 
 ON  ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF = CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50))) EORCTLOL   
 ON WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
  ON (WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND SATL.SS_CODE='OOD')
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON (NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
  ON(WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES WATLPTI
  ON (WORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_ADJD
  ON (WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL_ADJD.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL_ADJD.SS_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 ON EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND   NSOL.SS_CODE =  EORCTLOL.SS_CODE /* REMOVING NSOL.SS_CODE='BV' */
 WHERE COALESCE(NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG,'N')='N'
 
UNION ALL

SELECT
 SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
 ,SAT.AR_TRX_KEY                    
 ,SATL_ADJD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY       
 ,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
 ,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
 ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER              
 ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE  
 ,WOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE           
 ,WOFRCTL.LINE_NUMBER BK_AR_TRX_LINE_NUMBER_INT     
 ,WOFRCTL.REASON_CODE AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE       
 ,NULL  BK_SAF_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY       
 ,NULL BK_SAF_COMPANY_CODE           
 ,NULL  BK_SAF_ID_INT                 
 ,CASE WHEN WOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE='FREIGHT' THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
  (CASE WHEN EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL OR  EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID = 0  
 OR EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID = -9999 OR /* ADDED THIS ALSO */ EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID = -999
  THEN 'NON-APPLIED' ELSE 'APPLIED' END ) 
  END APPLIED_TRANSACTION_TYPE      
 ,CASE WHEN WATLPTI.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID =-9999 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AR_TRX_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ROLE   
 ,WOFRCTL.CREATION_DATE AR_TRX_LINE_CREATION_DATETIME 
 ,WOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
 ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE    
 ,WOFRCTL.DESCRIPTION   
 ,'=' AS RU_XAAS_PREPAYMENT_FLG
 /* , -9999 AS RU_BK_XAAS_SALES_ORDER_ID_INT */ /* Q3fy16 XAAS Changes  */
 ,WOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE 
 ,'I' AS DML_TYPE
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES WOFRCTL  
 /*  REPLACED   WITH INNER QUERY 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
 ON WOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID */
 INNER JOIN  ( SELECT  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , ORDER_LINE_ID,  SS_CODE 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA 
 ON  ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF = CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50))) EORCTLOL   
 ON WOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
  ON (WOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND SATL.SS_CODE='OOD')
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON (NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
  ON(WOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES WATLPTI
  ON (WOFRCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_ADJD
  ON (WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL_ADJD.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL_ADJD.SS_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 ON EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND   NSOL.SS_CODE =  EORCTLOL.SS_CODE /* REMOVING NSOL.SS_CODE='BV' */
 WHERE COALESCE(NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG,'N')='N'

SELECT
ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      ,
ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            ,
ATTRIBUTE15                   ,
ATTRIBUTE3                    ,
ATTRIBUTE4                    ,
CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               ,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          ,
DESCRIPTION                   ,
EXTENDED_AMOUNT               ,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7             ,
GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER           ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11    ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12    ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14    ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15    ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2     ,
GLOBAL_LINE_ID                ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8     ,
INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT        ,
GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID             ,
LINE_NUMBER                   ,
SORCTL.LINE_TYPE                     ,
LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
ORG_ID                        ,
SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
QUANTITY_CREDITED             ,
QUANTITY_INVOICED             ,
REASON_CODE                   ,
RULE_START_DATE               ,
TAX_RATE                      ,
UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE           ,
UNIT_SELLING_PRICE            ,
UOM_CODE                      ,
ATTRIBUTE1                    ,
ATTRIBUTE2                    ,
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6     ,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             ,
CREATION_DATE                 ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,
RULE_END_DATE                 ,
SPLIT_KEY                     ,
CREATE_DATETIME               ,
ACTION_CODE                   ,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL,
(SEL * FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='OOD') NSSC,
( SELECT  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , ORDER_LINE_ID,  SS_CODE 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA 
ON  ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF = CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT)AS VARCHAR(50)) GROUP BY 1,2,3 ) EORCTLON 
WHERE 
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLON.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
AND 
(
NOT EXISTS 
	( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME) 
OR NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL 
		WHERE SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE) 
OR NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
		WHERE SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT 
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE 
		AND SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
OR NOT EXISTS 
	( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES ELORCTL,$$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_ADJD 
		WHERE  SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = ELORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
		AND ELORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL_ADJD.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL_ADJD.SS_CODE) 
OR EXISTS 
	( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
		WHERE EORCTLON.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
		AND   NSOL.SS_CODE = EORCTLON.SS_CODE /* REMOVING NSOL.SS_CODE='BV'  */
		AND COALESCE(NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG,'N')='Y')		
)

SELECT
ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION  ,    
ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID         ,   
ATTRIBUTE15                ,   
ATTRIBUTE3                 ,   
ATTRIBUTE4                 ,   
CUSTOMER_TRX_ID            ,   
CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID       ,   
DESCRIPTION                ,   
EXTENDED_AMOUNT            ,   
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7          ,   
GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER        ,   
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11 ,   
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12 ,   
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14 ,   
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15 ,   
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2  ,   
GLOBAL_LINE_ID             ,   
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8  ,   
INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT     ,   
GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID          ,   
LINE_NUMBER                ,   
LINE_TYPE                  ,   
LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID   ,   
ORG_ID                     ,   
PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
QUANTITY_CREDITED          ,   
QUANTITY_INVOICED          ,   
REASON_CODE                ,   
RULE_START_DATE            ,   
TAX_RATE                   ,   
UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE        ,   
UNIT_SELLING_PRICE         ,   
UOM_CODE                   ,   
ATTRIBUTE1                 ,   
ATTRIBUTE2                 ,   
INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6  ,   
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID          ,   
CREATION_DATE              ,   
LAST_UPDATE_DATE           ,   
RULE_END_DATE              ,   
SPLIT_KEY                  ,   
CREATE_DATETIME            ,   
ACTION_CODE            
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES 
WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, WOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID) + SMATKEY.MAX_VAL AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
WOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMARTRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 from $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMARTRX ) SMATKEY,
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES  WOFRCTL 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES WIATLORDLND
ON (WIATLORDLND.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WOFRCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)
/* REPLACED   WITH INNER QUERY 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
ON WOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID */
INNER JOIN ( SELECT  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , ORDER_LINE_ID,  SS_CODE 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA 
ON  ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF = CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT)AS VARCHAR(50)) GROUP BY 1,2,3  ) EORCTLOL 
ON WOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
	ON(WOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
	AND SAT.SS_CODE='OOD')
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND NSOL.SS_CODE = EORCTLOL.SS_CODE		/*	REMOVING   NSOL.SS_CODE='BV'  */
WHERE
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMATRX
                        WHERE NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SMATRX.SS_CODE
                        AND WOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SMATRX.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT)
                        AND COALESCE(NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG,'N')='N'
